All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdventureUtils
Useful wrappers for MiniMessage/Kyori API
BaseCommand
This is a work in progress!
BaseConfig
The base config to handle options/locale inside the library.
Comment
The comment annotation with String value()
CommentType
Defines if we use BlockType or not for comments.
Console
This represents a "Console" on any server implementation.
CrazyCore
An interface to extend/implement that contains important methods.
CrazyCore.CrazyProvider
A class that contains static instances of CrazyCore
CrazyLogger
An internal logger to replace the old Logger in plugins.
CrazyLogger.InternalLogger
The internal logger class that does all the fancy magic.
CrazyPlayer
All player related data.
CrazyPlayerListener
An extendable class for player listeners.
CrazyPlayerRegistry
Manages player specific data.
FileExtension
An extension class we implement which handles everything needed to create files.
FileHandler
The file manager module handles both .json and .yaml files with ease.
FileManager
Base file manager for all platforms.
FileType
The file types we have available.
FileUtils
Any file utils we might need.
Header
The header annotation with String value()
JsonManager
Creates json files.
Key
The key annotation with String value()
Key
Simple string wrapper used to identify things.
Keyed
Represents a key identified object.
KeyedRegistry<Type extends Keyed>
Represents a registry of keyed objects.
Registry<Key,Value>
Represents a key-value pair registry.
Sender
This represents a "Sender" on any server implementation.
YamlManager
Creates yaml files.
